answers: Libraries offer free books, e-books, audiobooks, internet, events, study spaces, and more. Get a card — it's free!
Modern libraries: e-books via Libby/OverDrive app, free WiFi, meeting rooms, workshops, and community programs.
Tips: use interlibrary loan for books your library doesn't have, attend free events, and explore digital resources.
Library benefits: free access to knowledge, quiet study space, community hub, and programs for all ages.
